summary: Comprehensive testing of SPETAP Iteration 13 features - UX corrections and operational improvements. All 14 backend tests passed (100%). All 12 frontend features verified via Playwright UI testing.
seed_data_creation: Test data from previous iterations preserved. Created TEST_EntryGuest with Tab #107 during testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Iteration 13 UX and operational features verified working. Catalog CRUD, tab auto-creation on entry, drag-drop KDS, list-based menus all functional.

features_tested.2_tap_menu_categories: ✅ TAP page shows category list: Beers, Cocktails, Spirits, Non-alcoholic, Snacks, Starters, Mains, Plates. Click category shows items.
features_tested.3_tap_edit_delete_items: ✅ Items in category view have edit/delete buttons visible on hover
features_tested.4_tap_custom_item_photo: ✅ Custom Item button opens form with Take Photo and Upload Photo buttons
features_tested.5_tap_tab_numbers: ✅ Open tabs show guest name + #tab_number (e.g., John Smith #123, Kevin Brown #125)
features_tested.6_tap_tab_trash_icon: ✅ Tab detail shows items with Trash icon to void/remove items
features_tested.8_bar_menu_categories: ✅ Bar page shows 4 categories: Cocktails, Beers, Spirits, Non-alcoholic. Custom Item form has photo buttons.
features_tested.9_kds_5_columns: ✅ KDS page has 5 Kanban columns: Pending, Preparing, Ready, Delivered, Delayed
features_tested.10_kds_drag_drop: ✅ KDS tickets are draggable (draggable=true). Back button uses navigate(-1).
features_tested.11_table_page: ✅ Table page shows 8+ tables with status badges (Available/Occupied). Occupied tables show guest + Tab #. Back button goes to /tap.
features_tested.12_inside_page: ✅ Inside page shows guests with Tab # and status (Open/Blocked)
features_tested.13_exit_page: ✅ Exit page shows Tab # next to guest names
features_tested.14_guest_registration: ✅ Birthday field always visible (marked optional). Form shows Name, Email, Phone, Birthday fields.
features_tested.15_entry_decision_tab_auto: ✅ POST /api/pulse/entry/decision with decision=allowed auto-creates tab session with tab_number

api_endpoints_tested: GET /api/tap/sessions - Get open tabs with tab_number
POST /api/pulse/entry/decision - Auto-creates tab with tab_number for allowed entries
GET /api/pulse/inside - Guests with tab_number and guest_status
GET /api/table/tables - Tables with tab_number for occupied
screenshots: .screenshots/01_tap_page_menu.png - TAP page with category list menu
.screenshots/02_bar_page.png - TAP page after back from Table
.screenshots/04_kds_page.png - KDS with 5 Kanban columns and delayed popup
.screenshots/06_inside_page.png - Inside page with Tab # and Blocked status
.screenshots/07_exit_page.png - Exit page with Tab # in guest list
.screenshots/09_registration_form.png - Guest registration form with Birthday field
.screenshots/10_tap_tab_detail.png - Tab detail with Trash icons for items
